case_title: NICOLA QUILLIGAN VS. MARCO ANTONIO PEREZ CARRASCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-11-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED ALSO TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. PLAINTIFF NICOLA QUILLIGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARCO ANTONIO PEREZ CARRASCO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SHOWES THE COURT A PROOF OF SERVICE WHICH WAS NOT FILED (AND WHICH WAS ALSO UNTIMELY, 13 DAYS TOO SHORT). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER AND TO CURE SERVICE.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $685.00 [FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST] FILED BY QUILLIGAN, NICOLA AS TO DEFENDANT CARRASCO, MARCO ANTONIO PEREZ DBA TONY'S CARPET CLEANING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
